headline: How Investors Are Reacting To DoorDash (DASH) Earnings Beat, AI Push And Share Buybacks
summary: In the past quarter ended March 31, 2026, DoorDash reported sales of US$4.04 billion, up from US$3.03 billion a year earlier, while net income edged down to US$184 million from US$193 million and the company completed a US$205.5 million repurchase of 1,389,000 shares. Alongside its earnings, DoorDash highlighted momentum in non-restaurant categories and membership programs, underpinned by recent international tie‑ups, grocery partnerships, and continued investment in AI‑enabled...
